body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
closes #1348 
closes #1395

`dt_save_state_to_disk` was unused. There is a ClimaAtmos option with this name, but we pass `checkpoint_dt` to it.

`dt_save_to_sol` is parsed as `saveat` and used to save the state to `integrator.sol` periodically. We don't use this output anyway, since we have more robust checkpointing infrastructure these days. Here, the `dt_save_to_sol` option is removed, and `saveat` is set to save only at the start and end of the simulation. This will reduce the quantity of data output from our simulations.

## To-do
- [x] removed `dt_save_state_to_disk` for most runs (kept only for atmos-only configs, since those are passed to ClimaAtmos directly)
- [x] removed `dt_save_to_sol`
- [x] changed `checkpoint_dt` for integrated land longruns to monthly frequency, and other current "target" longruns to every 3 months so we can use these while debugging (most other runs will checkpoint just once at the end of the simulation)
title: rm `dt_save_state_to_disk` and `dt_save_to_sol` options
